fact: India won the ICC Cricket World Cup in 1983 under Kapil Dev.
Australia has won the ICC Cricket World Cup six times.
Virat Kohli is one of the fastest batsmen to reach 8000 ODI runs.
Argentina won the FIFA World Cup in 2022.
Lionel Messi won the Ballon d'Or a record eight times.
The FIFA World Cup is held every four years.
The NBA was founded in 1946.
Michael Jordan won six NBA championships with the Chicago Bulls.
A basketball team has five players on the court.
Wimbledon is the oldest tennis tournament in the world.
Novak Djokovic has won multiple Grand Slam titles.
The Australian Open is played on a hard court.
India won its first Thomas Cup in 2022.
P. V. Sindhu won the BWF World Championship in 2019.
A badminton match is played to 21 points per game.
India has won eight Olympic gold medals in field hockey.
The Hockey World Cup is organized by the FIH.
The Pro Kabaddi League started in 2014.
India has won multiple Kabaddi World Cup titles.
The modern Olympic Games began in 1896 in Athens.
